overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a gothic great hall with floating candles, warm sunlight streaming through stained glass windows, and translucent ghostly figures walking among long dining tables. The stationary camera captures the atmospheric supernatural environment reminiscent of a magical school dining hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral great hall with floating candles and dining tables

multiple ghostly figures now visible walking through the central aisle and between tables

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the entrance of the great hall observing the supernatural activity and dining students

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure in robes walking from left to right across the hall
translucent ghostly figure moving through the tables toward the center

entered.detail: thousands of suspended candles creating a chandelier effect throughout the vaulted ceiling
large ornate stained glass window casting colored light patterns onto the stone floor
rows of dark wooden banquet tables with seated figures dining
tall pointed gothic arches and stone columns lining the hall sides

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a magnificent gothic great hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles and warm sunlight through a large stained glass window. Ghostly translucent figures begin walking through the space between long dining tables where people are seated, creating an atmosphere of magical realism. The stone architecture and dramatic lighting emphasize the grandeur of the cathedral-like interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary perspective of a magnificent gothic great hall that transforms from a grand architectural space into a scene of supernatural activity. It begins by establishing the cathedral-like interior, where thousands of floating candles and warm sunlight streaming through a large stained glass window illuminate the stone architecture. As the light settles, translucent ghostly figures emerge and begin drifting through the aisles between long dining tables where people are seated. The scene then deepens in its atmosphere of magical realism as these spirits glide through the space, blending the physical grandeur of the hall with a haunting, ethereal presence.
